actions.name: DISCORD_MEDIA
actions.description: Run a Discord media operation: download a media attachment or URL, or transcribe an audio or video attachment.

actions.name: DISCORD_SUMMARIZE_CONVERSATION
actions.description: Summarize a date or time range from the stored Discord conversation history. For recent channel-message requests such as 'summarize last 100 messages', use MESSAGE with operation=read and source=discord instead.

actions.name: DISCORD_CREATE_POLL
actions.description: Create a Discord poll when the user asks for a poll or vote.

actions.name: DISCORD_SETUP_CREDENTIALS
actions.description: Start Discord credential setup or account pairing when the user requests setup.
